title.tagline: Trust the colors and move toward the target.

classic.label: RGB Additive
classic.description: Add RGB to move toward white. The round ends when any channel is pushed too far.

cmySubtractive.label: CMY Subtractive
cmySubtractive.description: Subtract RGB with CMY to move toward black. The round ends when any channel is pulled too far.

clampChallenge.label: Clamp Challenge
clampChallenge.description: Choose one of three offered cards. Continue after one color bursts; the next new burst ends the round. Initial colors and cards tend to be brighter, and bursting lowers the score ceiling.

specialDeck.label: Special Deck
specialDeck.description: Choose from three cards including RGB adjustment, channel swap, saturation, brightness, value reveal, and burst prevention effects.

custom.description: Play with this rule's custom settings.

game.offerInstruction: Choose a card to apply its effect immediately
game.statusAnnouncement: Check the current color and color choices. Round {{round}}, {{cards}} cards remaining.
game.continuedBurst: {{count}} color burst · continuing at the limit
game.revealedColorValues: Current values revealed by card effect
